title: Clever Kids Samui
shortDesc: Calm, Montessori-inspired indoor play space with wooden toys, gentle music and an outdoor area — perfect for babies to 5-year-olds.
description: Clever Kids Samui in Maenam is a relaxed, supervised indoor play space designed for very young children. The space features Montessori and wooden toys, a calm atmosphere with gentle music, air-conditioning and a small outdoor area. Ideal for expat families and long-stay visitors looking for a regular drop-off option for babies and toddlers.
